## About page build report

### 1. `app/(pages)/about/page.tsx`
Stub only — centered heading, no sections/metadata:

```1:8:app/(pages)/about/page.tsx
export default function AboutPage() {
    return (
        <main className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center px-6 py-24">
            <h1 className="font-sans text-3xl font-semibold text-alic-navy">About</h1>
        </main>
    );
}
```

### 2. Homepage sections (`components/home/`)
| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `Hero.tsx` + `.module.css` | Full-bleed hero |
| `Foundation.tsx` + `.module.css` | History / mission |
| `Work.tsx` + `.module.css` | Offerings + real images |
| `InMotion.tsx` + `.module.css` | Stories grid + `StoryCard` |
| `Purpose.tsx` + `.module.css` | Closing CTA |
| `ImagePlaceholder.tsx` + `.module.css` | Placeholder (unused) |

**Patterns:** PascalCase section name; co-located `Name.module.css`; `<section className={styles.section}>` + often `styles.inner`; home page composes them in `app/page.tsx`. Horizontal padding on content sections: **`padding-inline: 40px`**. Real `next/image` used everywhere; **`ImagePlaceholder` is not imported anywhere**.

### 3. About assets in `public/`
**None.** Existing folders: `hero/`, `foundation/`, `work/`, `inmotion/` + logos/social SVGs.

### 4. APIs

**`ImagePlaceholder`** (`components/home/ImagePlaceholder.tsx`)
- Props: `label: string`; `aspect?: "6/5" \| "3/2" \| "4/3" \| "16/10"` (default `"16/10"`); `tone?: "default" \| "warm"`
- Renders `role="img"` div with labeled aspect-ratio box

**`StoryCard`** (`components/shared/StoryCard.tsx`)
- Props: `text: string`; `href: string`
- Navy card + `CtaButton` (“View Story”, `arrow`)
- Used in `InMotion` only

### 5. Contact page patterns to reuse
- Page: `app/(pages)/contact/page.tsx` — `<main className="flex-1 bg-alic-cream">` + layout wrapper
- Layout: `components/contact/ContactLayout.module.css` — **`padding: 2.5rem 50px 3rem`** (desktop `3.5rem 50px 4rem`); 1→2 col grid at `900px`
- Hero: `ContactHero` — serif `clamp` h1, sans body, `fadeUp` motion, `aria-labelledby`
- Metadata export on page
- Side padding: contact uses **50px**; home sections use **40px**

### 6. “Explore our solutions” destination
No literal “Explore our solutions” string in app code. Closest links:
- **`/solutions`** — `Work.tsx` (`LiveBalanced™`, Expert Advisory); nav `ResponsiveNav.tsx`
- Stub page: `app/(pages)/solutions/page.tsx`

Use **`href="/solutions"`** for that CTA.
